error_signature: The request is missing a required parameter

error_signature: Cannot find module 'hyperformula'

error_signature: missing file-name parameter

error_signature: 404 error for production webhook URL

symptom: Users receive a 404 error when trying to access the production webhook URL on Railway, while the test webhook URL works fine.

error_signature: Invalid URL

error_signature: Invalid URL

error_signature: execution data persists despite save settings

error_signature: 403 - Forbidden

error_signature: data tables config is broken after update

error_signature: Error 400: ObjectHandle is Invalid

error_signature: argument must be a string (was: undefined)

error_signature: secretOrPrivateKey must be an asymmetric key when using RS256

symptom: When testing Salesforce credentials in n8n, the error 'secretOrPrivateKey must be an asymmetric key when using RS256' is displayed. This occurs regardless of the hosting type or environment.

error_signature: PG Vector credentials are empty

error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading ‘options’)

error_signature: 550 5.7.708 Service unavailable. Access denied

error_signature: could not extend file because project size limit (512 MB) has been exceeded

error_signature: Import template not working

error_signature: Error fetching from https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta

symptom: When attempting to connect to the Google Gemini API via a proxy, n8n throws an error indicating it cannot fetch from the specified URL.

error_signature: Media type 'application/mp4' is not supported

symptom: The YouTube Upload Node fails with a 'Media type application/mp4 is not supported' error when attempting to upload .mp4 files.

error_signature: Request failed with status code 429

error_signature: There was a problem generating the authorization URL

symptom: When attempting to connect a Microsoft Outlook account, n8n displays 'There was a problem generating the authorization URL'. This occurs intermittently and seems to resolve without changes.

error_signature: automatic workflow does not forward items

symptom: The filter node does not forward items that meet the criteria during automatic execution, but works correctly in manual execution.

error_signature: undefined

symptom: When retrying a workflow after a Not Approved status, the prompt data becomes undefined due to incorrect referencing.

error_signature: Redis node only returns the last element of the list

symptom: The Redis node in n8n only retrieves the last element of a list instead of all elements.

error_signature: SERVER_ERROR: Check your request and try again

symptom: Using brackets in the value field of the HTTP Request node results in a server 500 error. The error message indicates a parse exception related to the brackets.

error_signature: no incoming requests in server logs from Evolution API

symptom: The n8n webhook does not trigger when WhatsApp messages are sent, and there are no incoming requests logged from the Evolution API.

error_signature: Error 400: redirect_uri_mismatch
title: Gmail OAuth redirect URI mismatch error
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Gmail OAuth, the user receives an 'Error 400: redirect_uri_mismatch' message. This occurs due to the redirect URL being incorrectly set to 'localhost'.

error_signature: default value in the header auth section

symptom: The authorization key for the Fal AI node reverts to the default value after saving, indicating it was not properly saved.

error_signature: workflow fails to resume safely after partial execution

symptom: When a workflow processing large datasets fails, it restarts from the beginning, causing duplicates and skipped records.

error_signature: infinite loop in workflow
title: Infinite loop caused by item linking in nested loops
symptom: The workflow enters an infinite loop after processing the first batch, leading to thousands of executions despite a limited number of JSON files.

error_signature: value in the node changes unexpectedly

symptom: Using an assignment operator in a Set node's JS expression causes the underlying JSON value to change unexpectedly.

error_signature: Facebook Leads Ads Trigger not receiving data

error_signature: getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN api.notion.com

symptom: When executing a workflow with a Notion Trigger automatically, it throws a 'getaddrinfo EAI_AGAIN' error. However, manual execution of the same workflow works without issues.

error_signature: multiple executions due to webhook calls

symptom: The automation runs multiple executions (2-5) each time it is triggered, causing a queue in n8n. This affects the performance of other automations relying on Vapi.

error_signature: The service was not able to process your request

symptom: When attempting to upload a JPEG image to WordPress via n8n, the error 'The service was not able to process your request' appears, indicating authorization issues with the file type.

error_signature: Field type 'hiddenField' in field 1 is not valid for form fields

error_signature: Could not connect to your MCP server

symptom: The MCP Client node fails to connect to the specified MCP server, displaying an error message. This prevents the workflow from executing as intended.

error_signature: The URL or verification code could not be validated

symptom: When trying to register a production webhook URL with Facebook, the error 'The URL or verification code could not be validated' appears.

error_signature: Code node set to run once is running on each

symptom: The Code node, intended to run once, is executing for each item due to incorrect node connections. This leads to unexpected item counts in the output.

error_signature: unable to process Word files in n8n workflow
title: Issues processing Word files in n8n workflow
symptom: The user is unable to properly detect or process Word files in their n8n workflow, leading to failures in extracting text.

error_signature: webhook not receiving requests

symptom: Requests sent to the webhook URL result in no executions or errors, indicating the webhook is not active.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')

symptom: The script fails with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')' when trying to process the JSON data.

error_signature: Loop Node Only Processes the First Item

symptom: The nested loop node processes data correctly for the first month but fails to extract data for the second month, going directly to the 'Done' branch.

error_signature: Unauthorized

symptom: When attempting to sign in with Google in the Google Calendar node, an 'Unauthorized' error is returned after logging in and granting access.

error_signature: endless loop begins after the first loop

symptom: When using the Loop Over Items node, an endless loop occurs after the first iteration, causing only the first URL to be executed repeatedly.

error_signature: API requires credentials as query parameters

error_signature: Unrecognized node type: @brave/n8n-nodes-brave-search.braveSearch

error_signature: does not use the Data Store

error_signature: 400 Bad Request

error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters

error_signature: 530 Authentication required

error_signature: HTTP Request - Response body is not valid JSON

error_signature: Default Data Loader splitting input data

error_signature: externally-managed-environment

error_signature: localhost refused to connect

error_signature: data not saved in accumulator

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0')

error_signature: Internal Server Error

error_signature: License request failed with status code 403

error_signature: Cannot find module 'jsdom' or its corresponding type declarations.

error_signature: Trigger doesn't work when it should start the workflow
title: Facebook Leads trigger not receiving data
symptom: The Facebook Leads trigger is not activating when a test lead is sent, indicating that the workflow is not starting as expected.

error_signature: authentication code sent in URL instead of body
title: OAuth2 authentication code sent incorrectly
symptom: When attempting to authenticate via OAuth2, the application returns a URL with the code in the query string instead of the body. This leads to authentication failures.

error_signature: ERR_ASSERTION - refreshToken is required
title: Missing refresh token in custom Zoho Sign OAuth2 credentials
symptom: When the access token expires, the error 'ERR_ASSERTION - refreshToken is required' occurs due to the absence of a refresh token in the stored credentials.

error_signature: This operation expects the node's input data to contain a binary file 'data'
title: Merge node not finding binary data
symptom: The merge node throws an error stating that it expects binary data, but none is found when merging multiple inputs.

error_signature: 406 Not Acceptable
title: 406 error when calling KnowBe4 API from n8n
symptom: When executing an HTTP Request node to the KnowBe4 API, n8n returns a 406 Not Acceptable error, while the same request works in Postman.

error_signature: MCP client node transfers into an error state
title: MCP Client Node Error Handling Issue
symptom: The MCP client node enters an error state, but the AI agent reports success instead of the error message. This leads to incorrect outputs in the workflow.

error_signature: The file /shared/test.txt is not writable
title: File write operation fails due to incorrect environment variable
symptom: The workflow fails to write a binary file to disk, returning 'The file /shared/test.txt is not writable'. Despite having correct permissions, the operation does not succeed.

error_signature: Multiple matching items for item [1] [item 1]
title: Gmail label node fails after merge node
symptom: The Gmail label node fails with the error 'Multiple matching items for item [1] [item 1]' when placed after a merge node. It works correctly when placed before the merge node.

error_signature: Error loading package "n8n-nodes-deepseek" :Package could not be installed
title: Unable to install community nodes in n8n
symptom: Users encounter an error when trying to install any community node, specifically 'Package could not be installed'. This prevents the addition of new functionality to n8n workflows.

error_signature: 500 - "Server Error"
title: Server Error when uploading binary image to tmpfiles.org
symptom: When attempting to upload a binary image to tmpfiles.org using the HTTP Request node, a 500 Server Error is returned.

error_signature: metadata becomes [object Object]
title: Metadata not serialized correctly when sending files
symptom: When sending files through the embedded n8n chat, the metadata is not serialized correctly and appears as [object Object]. This prevents proper processing of the metadata in n8n.

error_signature: Response [200] without expected JSON output
title: LLM output not visible in Google Colab
symptom: The response from the n8n workflow shows '<Response [200]>' instead of the expected JSON output from the AI Agent.

error_signature: the item has no binary field ‘data’ [item 0]
title: Missing binary data in Gmail node
symptom: When attempting to send an email with an attachment from Gmail, n8n throws an error stating 'the item has no binary field ‘data’ [item 0]'. This indicates that the expected binary data for the attachment is not present.

error_signature: The value 'some value' is not supported
title: Zoho CRM node stage name input issue
symptom: When trying to select a stage name in the Zoho CRM node, the error 'The value 'some value' is not supported' appears.

error_signature: Returned type uuid does not match expected type bigint in column 1
title: UUID vs BigInt type mismatch in Supabase function
symptom: When executing a function in Supabase, an error occurs stating 'Returned type uuid does not match expected type bigint in column 1'. This prevents successful execution of the function.

error_signature: Workflow Not Found
title: Workflows missing in UI after PostgreSQL instability
symptom: Users see 'Workflow Not Found' when trying to access workflows in the UI, despite them running in the background.

error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Nextcloud connection error due to untrusted domains
symptom: When attempting to connect n8n to Nextcloud, the error 'Bad request - please check your parameters' is displayed. This prevents the retrieval of files from Nextcloud.

error_signature: column “history” does not exist
title: PostgreSQL query fails due to incorrect quoting
symptom: Executing a query in the PostgreSQL node results in an error stating 'column “history” does not exist'. This occurs when trying to call a function with incorrectly quoted parameters.

error_signature: Input data field name mismatch
title: Mismatch in input data field name for upload file node
symptom: The upload file node throws an error due to incorrect input data field name. The expected field name is not matching the provided name.

error_signature: no results returned from PostgreSQL query
title: PostgreSQL Lookup returns no results with expression
symptom: The PostgreSQL Lookup node returns no results when using an expression for the chat_id, despite the value being correct. Hardcoding the value works as expected.

error_signature: extra * in WhatsApp message
title: Extra asterisks in WhatsApp messages from OpenAI
symptom: Messages sent to WhatsApp from the OpenAI node contain extra asterisks, resulting in formatting issues.

error_signature: (#100) The parameter image_url is required
title: Missing image_url parameter due to typo
symptom: The Facebook Graph API node throws an error stating that the 'image_url' parameter is required, despite it being set in the workflow.

error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: Failed to resolve host
title: Telegram Trigger webhook resolution failure
symptom: When testing the Telegram Trigger, n8n throws a 'Bad Request: bad webhook: Failed to resolve host' error.

error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: API key authentication failure due to malformed JWT
symptom: Users encounter an 'Authorization failed - please check your credentials' error with a 'jwt malformed' message when trying to authenticate with their API keys.

error_signature: cannot login nor send smtp email
title: User deletion prevents login and SMTP email sending
symptom: After deleting the user from the database, the user cannot log in or send SMTP emails. The setup screen is also inaccessible.

error_signature: data pills unable to differentiate by node
title: Data pills not differentiating between nodes
symptom: When dragging data pills with the same name from different nodes, the expression remains the same, causing confusion.

error_signature: file not found
title: File not found in production for Read/Write Files node
symptom: The Read/Write Files from Disk node works in test mode but fails in production, returning no data or errors related to missing files.

error_signature: This message was sent automatically with n8n
title: Persistent n8n attribution signature in Telegram messages
symptom: The message 'This message was sent automatically with n8n' appears in all Telegram messages sent from workflows, despite attempts to remove it.

error_signature: N8N_EXPERIMENTAL_FEATURES_ENABLED=true not needed for Text Classifier
title: Unnecessary experimental features flag for Text Classifier
symptom: The user has set the environment variable for experimental features, but it is not required for the Text Classifier node.

error_signature: Invalid delete request
title: Invalid delete request for Gmail label
symptom: When attempting to delete the 'STARRED' label in Gmail, an error message 'Invalid delete request' is returned.

error_signature: Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback
title: OAuth2 callback insufficient parameters for Excel
symptom: When attempting to connect n8n to Excel, the error 'Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback' is displayed, indicating a failure in the connection process.

error_signature: No output data returned
title: Airtable Record Search node returns no output data
symptom: The Airtable Record Search node stops execution and displays 'No output data returned', preventing the workflow from reaching the IF node.

error_signature: two nodes running at the same time
title: Browserflow node shows misleading execution status
symptom: The Browserflow node appears to run simultaneously with another node, causing confusion in the execution log. The editor shows fewer processed items than the actual execution count.

error_signature: duplicate messages sent by WhatsApp node
title: Duplicate messages sent by WhatsApp node
symptom: The WhatsApp node sends duplicate messages and saves duplicate records in Google Sheets. The execution log shows only one execution.

error_signature: invalid_grant
title: Invalid grant error when obtaining Google access token
symptom: When attempting to get an access token using the authorization code in n8n, the process fails with an 'invalid_grant' error.

error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Asana API returns bad request due to null date
symptom: When trying to create an Asana project from a template, the HTTP request fails with a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error. The error details indicate that 'Day cannot be null'.

error_signature: empty data returned from Call Another Workflow node
title: Empty data returned from Call Another Workflow node
symptom: The Main Workflow receives empty data instead of the expected output after calling the Output-Workflow. The Output-Workflow does not wait for the full duration set in the Wait node.

error_signature: your query was not provided in the message
title: AI agent not recognizing user query
symptom: The AI agent responds with 'your query was not provided in the message' when trying to create a task, indicating it cannot parse the input correctly.

error_signature: Puppeteer node not opening visible browser
title: Puppeteer node not opening in headful mode
symptom: The Puppeteer node does not open a visible browser window for manual interaction when running workflows that require CAPTCHA solving.

error_signature: No path back to referenced node
title: No path back to referenced node error in if node
symptom: When executing a workflow, n8n throws an error stating 'No path back to referenced node'. This occurs even when the nodes appear to be connected.

error_signature: unable to merge data
title: Issue merging data in n8n
symptom: The user is unable to merge overdue and today's tasks in a single message. The merge operation does not yield the expected results.

error_signature: number format not transforming in Google Sheets
title: Number format not transforming in Google Sheets
symptom: When attempting to format numbers with different decimal separators in Google Sheets, the output remains unchanged despite using the replace function.

error_signature: messages are being sent out again
title: Postgres integration causes message sending issues
symptom: When the Postgres chat memory is used, messages are not sent to either the tenant or the team lead, leading to a silent failure.

error_signature: Compare datasets node not identifying new properties
title: Compare Datasets Node Fails to Identify New Properties
symptom: The Compare datasets node shows incorrect results, indicating only one result instead of the expected two. Additionally, the Telegram node sends notifications for all properties instead of just the newly added ones.

error_signature: webhook not visible in the editor
title: Webhook not visible in n8n editor
symptom: The webhook appears to be functioning as it receives requests, but it is not visible in the n8n editor, leading to confusion about its status.

error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'manager')
title: TypeError during n8n initialization
symptom: Upon starting n8n, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'manager')'. This prevents n8n from initializing properly.

error_signature: duplicate webhook executions
title: Duplicate executions for a single webhook call
symptom: When a webhook is called, multiple executions are triggered for the same request, leading to duplicate processing.

error_signature: Invalid expression
title: Invalid expression in Telegram node due to missing trigger
symptom: The workflow throws an 'Invalid expression' error when executed, indicating that the expression cannot be resolved.

error_signature: could not parse the JSON body
title: GPT node JSON parsing error in production
symptom: In production mode, the GPT node throws an error stating 'could not parse the JSON body'. This issue does not occur in test workflows.

error_signature: ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR
title: SSL Protocol Error when setting Google Sheets credentials
symptom: When attempting to set Google Sheets credentials, n8n displays 'ERR_SSL_PROTOCOL_ERROR' indicating a secure connection issue.

error_signature: 401 - Unauthorized
title: Unauthorized error when making GET request
symptom: When attempting to make a GET request to the iRacing API, the response returns a 401 Unauthorized error, indicating that requests must be authorized.

error_signature: credentials not available
title: n8n credentials unavailable in manual execution mode
symptom: When manually executing an n8n workflow, nodes that require OAuth credentials fail with 'credentials not available' or 'OAuth credentials unavailable'.

error_signature: Quota exceeded for quota metric ‘Read requests’
title: Google Sheets API quota exceeded
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating that the quota for read requests has been exceeded, preventing further API calls.

error_signature: n8n version is still running on 1.119.2
title: Docker installation not updating n8n version
symptom: After pulling new versions of n8n and launching the container, the logs indicate that n8n is still running version 1.119.2.

error_signature: Timezone set to Default
title: Timezone set to Default causing date issues
symptom: The workflow fails to process date-time correctly due to the timezone being set to Default, leading to incorrect date parsing.

error_signature: n8n started as a new instance, ignoring existing data
title: n8n resets to fresh install after setting N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY
symptom: After setting the N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY in Docker Compose, n8n behaves as a fresh install, losing all workflows and credentials.

error_signature: The value in "Hello again! How can I help you?" is not set
title: Value not set error in Convert to File node
symptom: The Convert to File node throws an error stating that the value is not set when trying to convert the output of the AI agent into a file.

error_signature: Wait node fails on long intervals
title: Wait node fails on long intervals in v2.6.4
symptom: The Wait node in n8n stops and never resumes when set to 5 minutes. No errors are logged, and it stays in 'Waiting' status indefinitely.

error_signature: Header name must be a valid HTTP token [“Header Auth account”]
title: Invalid HTTP token in header authentication
symptom: When executing a workflow with the PerplexityAI API, an error occurs stating 'Header name must be a valid HTTP token [“Header Auth account”]'. This prevents the workflow from running successfully.

error_signature: Couldn’t connect with these settings
title: SSH connection failure in n8n
symptom: When attempting to use the SSH node to connect to localhost, n8n returns 'Couldn’t connect with these settings'. The connection fails despite successful SSH access from the server itself.

error_signature: cannot access binary data using {{ $(“Telegram”).item.binary.data }}
title: Error accessing binary data in Telegram node
symptom: Using the expression '{{ $(“Telegram”).item.binary.data }}' results in an error, displaying '[object Object]'.

error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters Invalid input: image URL is required
title: Image URL required for API request
symptom: The workflow fails with a 'Bad request' error indicating that an image URL is required. This occurs when the API does not accept the image as a binary file.

error_signature: Connection lost
title: Connection lost during PDF extraction
symptom: The n8n service loses connection and restarts when attempting to extract text from a PDF file using the Extract from PDF node.

error_signature: no data with an image in it
title: Image data not being sent to server
symptom: The PHP page receives the post with metadata but no actual image data is included.

error_signature: binaryPropertyNames.split is not a function
title: Error handling binary file in Gemini node
symptom: When attempting to send a binary file to the Gemini node, the error 'binaryPropertyNames.split is not a function' occurs, indicating a problem with how the binary data is being processed.

error_signature: no output for invalid file paths
title: No output for invalid file paths in Read/Write Files node
symptom: When using dynamic expressions for file paths, the Read/Write Files from Disk node produces no output for invalid paths. This can lead to fewer output items than expected.

error_signature: command /usr/local/bin/task-runner-launcher not found
title: Task runner launcher command not found in Docker setup
symptom: When setting up n8n with Docker Compose, the error 'command /usr/local/bin/task-runner-launcher not found' occurs.

error_signature: 403 - AuthenticationFailed
title: Azure SAS token authentication failure
symptom: When using a custom auth credential with Azure SAS tokens, the request returns a 403 error indicating authentication failure. The query string parameters do not appear to be correctly formatted.

error_signature: Bad Request: bad webhook: Failed to resolve host: Name or service not known
title: Telegram webhook fails to resolve host
symptom: When trying to use the Telegram node, the error 'Bad Request: bad webhook: Failed to resolve host: Name or service not known' is displayed. This prevents the webhook from functioning correctly.

error_signature: connection timed out
title: AI Agent node connection timeout due to proxy settings
symptom: The AI Agent node throws a 'connection timed out' error when trying to connect through a proxy, despite environment variables being set.

error_signature: binary property dropped from output
title: Code node drops binary property from output
symptom: The Code node is expected to return both JSON and binary data, but only the JSON property appears in the output. This leads to downstream nodes failing due to missing binary data.

error_signature: LocalFileTrigger disabled by default
title: Local File Trigger is disabled in n8n v2
symptom: Users are unable to access the Local File Trigger node in n8n, leading to confusion about its availability.

error_signature: memory usage soared to 4,000,000K
title: Excessive memory usage in code node with buffer
symptom: After connecting a code node that processes a buffer, Chrome's memory usage spikes to 4,000,000K.

error_signature: Simplify Output toggle not available
title: Simplify Output toggle missing in Share operation
symptom: The user cannot find the 'Simplify Output' toggle when using the Share operation in the Google Drive node.

error_signature: credentials not found
title: HTTP Request node returns 'credentials not found' error
symptom: When executing a workflow with the HTTP Request node, it returns a 'credentials not found' error despite having valid credentials. This occurs even when the user has admin privileges.

error_signature: Cannot delete a running execution
title: Error deleting a running execution
symptom: When trying to delete a running execution via the API, the error 'Cannot delete a running execution' is returned.

error_signature: ECONNRESET / socket hang up
title: Intermittent ECONNRESET errors in HTTP Request node
symptom: The HTTP Request node fails intermittently with ECONNRESET errors, indicating that the connection was closed unexpectedly. This occurs across multiple workflows and nodes, roughly once per day.

error_signature: The service is receiving too many requests from you
title: HTTP 429 Rate Limit Error in HTTP Request Node
symptom: When executing a workflow that makes multiple HTTP requests, the second request fails with a 'too many requests' error. This prevents further execution of the workflow.

error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘file’ [item 0]
title: Binary field mismatch in HTTP Request nodes
symptom: When executing the workflow, an error occurs stating that the item has no binary field ‘file’. This prevents the workflow from proceeding correctly.

error_signature: HTTP node re-triggers on loop iteration
title: HTTP Request node re-executes in loop
symptom: The HTTP Request node is triggered multiple times during loop iterations, causing slowdowns and increased API costs.

error_signature: The item has no binary field ‘data’
title: Missing binary field in Decompress node
symptom: When using the Decompress node, an error occurs stating 'The item has no binary field ‘data’'. This prevents the workflow from processing the compressed file.

error_signature: 403 error due to insufficient permissions
title: Gmail OAuth fails with 403 error for read-only access
symptom: When attempting to authenticate Gmail with read-only scopes, a 403 error occurs if additional scopes are not accepted.

error_signature: sessionId not passed to workflow tool
title: sessionId not being sent to workflow tool
symptom: The AI agent fails to send the sessionId to the workflow tool, resulting in incomplete data being passed. The workflow tool only receives the chat input without the necessary session ID.

error_signature: Stop and Error node returns empty output
title: Stop and Error node not returning expected output
symptom: The output of the 'Stop and Error' node is empty, even when catching errors in a parent workflow.

error_signature: localhost not allowed as redirect hostname
title: Google OAuth redirect URL issue with localhost
symptom: The OAuth Redirect URL for Google Drive setup in n8n is set to localhost, which is not accepted by Google. This prevents successful OAuth authentication.

error_signature: pipeline/stage limitation
title: Pipeline and stage limitation in HubSpot Create Deal Node
symptom: The HubSpot Create Deal node does not fetch all deal stages from different pipelines, limiting the options available for selection.

error_signature: no images returned from S3 folder
title: S3 Node not retrieving images from specified folder
symptom: When attempting to get images from a specific folder in an S3 bucket, no images are returned. The S3 node only retrieves images from the bucket level.

error_signature: Error [ERR_REQUIRE_ESM]: require() of ES Module
title: Node-fetch requires ESM instead of CommonJS
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating that 'require() of ES Module' is not supported. This occurs after updating n8n and using node-fetch version 3.x.

error_signature: Received tool input did not match expected schema
title: Input schema mismatch with MCP Server tool
symptom: The AI Agent encounters an error stating 'Received tool input did not match expected schema' when communicating with the MCP Server tool.

error_signature: Request timed out.
title: Request timed out in Supabase Vector Store integration
symptom: When querying the Supabase Vector Store, the request takes an excessively long time and eventually times out, displaying 'Request timed out.'

error_signature: client IP address not found in webhook node
title: Client IP address not available in Webhook node
symptom: The Webhook node does not expose the client IP address directly, leading to difficulties in fetching it.

error_signature: Airtable Trigger not firing in testing mode
title: Airtable Trigger not firing in testing mode
symptom: The Airtable Trigger node does not fire as expected in testing mode, despite correct configuration.

error_signature: Your URL didn’t respond with the value of the challenge parameter
title: Slack URL verification failure
symptom: When attempting to verify the Slack request URL, the error 'Your URL didn’t respond with the value of the challenge parameter' is returned.

error_signature: UI always shows an 'Offline' status
title: n8n UI shows Offline status after upgrade
symptom: After upgrading to version 2.7.0, the n8n UI displays an 'Offline' status, preventing publishing or saving changes. The interface also becomes sluggish and unresponsive.

error_signature: newly uploaded Excel files not appearing in the list
title: New Excel files not visible in Google Sheets Trigger
symptom: Newly uploaded Excel files do not appear in the dropdown list of the Google Sheets trigger. Only previously existing files are shown.

error_signature: OAuth2 connection will request the scope (w_organization_social)

symptom: The LinkedIn OAuth2 connection fails due to missing permissions for the 'w_organization_social' scope, preventing posting as an organization.

error_signature: Couldn’t connect with these settings
title: GitLab node connection issue after inactivity
symptom: After a period of inactivity, the GitLab node fails to connect, showing 'Couldn’t connect with these settings'. Re-executing the node resolves the issue temporarily.

error_signature: IF node always returns true for non-existent file
title: IF node incorrectly evaluates non-existent Google Drive file
symptom: The IF node always returns true when checking for a non-existent Google Drive file, leading to incorrect workflow execution.

error_signature: There was a problem loading the parameter options from server: '[object Object]'
title: Notion Update DB parameter loading issue
symptom: When attempting to load parameters for the Notion Update DB node, an error message appears stating there was a problem loading the parameter options from the server.

error_signature: cannot select or locate Google sheet
title: Unable to select Google Sheet in Google Sheets node
symptom: The user cannot select or locate their Google Sheet when trying to add rows in the Google Sheets node.

error_signature: insert or update on table 'workflow_entity' violates foreign key constraint
title: Database migration failure due to foreign key constraint
symptom: The migration process fails with an error related to the 'workflow_entity' table, preventing the n8n container from starting properly.

error_signature: HTTP request does not return any value
title: Handling missing Jira ID in HTTP request
symptom: When the HTTP request to find a Jira ID fails, no error is thrown, and the workflow does not create a Jira ticket.

error_signature: Webhook call received but event not caught
title: Shopify Trigger not catching events
symptom: When sending a POST request to the Shopify Trigger webhook URL, the event is not caught despite receiving a success message.

error_signature: out of memory or times out during processing
title: Memory issue when processing large CSV files
symptom: When processing large CSV files with 10,000 rows, n8n runs out of memory or times out.

error_signature: cannot see the model in the dropdown list
title: Llama 3.2 model not appearing in n8n dropdown
symptom: After setting up the Llama 3.2 model in Docker, it does not appear in the n8n model dropdown despite a successful connection test.

error_signature: unable to connect to n8n from Docker container
title: Connection issue between Docker n8n and Claude MCP
symptom: Users are unable to connect the Claude MCP server running in Docker to the n8n instance, resulting in communication failures.

error_signature: Could not connect to your MCP server
title: MCP Client cannot connect to MCP server
symptom: The MCP Client node fails to connect to the MCP server, displaying 'Could not connect to your MCP server'. This occurs consistently when attempting to run workflows that utilize the MCP Client.

error_signature: form-data payload size exceeds limit
title: Form-data payload size exceeds limit for large files
symptom: When uploading PDF files over 200MB, the form and webhook do not show the binary file and do not fail, leading to silent errors.

error_signature: Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback
title: OAuth2 callback insufficient parameters for SharePoint
symptom: When attempting to connect to SharePoint, n8n returns 'Insufficient parameters for OAuth2 callback'. This indicates a permissions issue with the OAuth2 setup.

error_signature: only shows HTML data instead of binary data
title: Receiving HTML data instead of binary file
symptom: When attempting to upload a file to the accounting system, the response contains HTML data instead of the expected binary file data.

error_signature: workflow executes old version instead of updated nodes
title: Webhook triggers old workflow version
symptom: The webhook from Airtable executes the workflow, but the downstream nodes do not reflect the latest updates made in the editor.

error_signature: (#10) Application does not have permission for this action
title: Facebook Graph Node Permission Error
symptom: When executing a workflow with the Facebook Graph node, an error occurs stating 'Bad request - please check your parameters' and '(#10) Application does not have permission for this action'.

error_signature: Failed to refresh slots cache
title: Redis cluster slots cache refresh failure
symptom: When starting n8n in queue mode with Redis cluster, it throws 'Failed to refresh slots cache'. This prevents the application from functioning correctly.

error_signature: Your current role does not have permission to perform this action.

symptom: When attempting to perform actions in the NetSuite node, an error indicates insufficient permissions. The error message states 'Your current role does not have permission to perform this action.'

error_signature: Forbidden: bot can’t initiate conversation with a user

symptom: When trying to send a message using the Telegram node, n8n returns 'Forbidden: bot can’t initiate conversation with a user'.

error_signature: column 'ZfmiJYuNv3ekva5s' does not exist

error_signature: Cannot find module 'minifaker/locales/fr'

symptom: When trying to import the French locale of minifaker in a Code node, an error occurs indicating that the module cannot be found.

error_signature: 403 - Forbidden

error_signature: Unexpected response from Salesforce bulk API

error_signature: sequential processing of webhooks

error_signature: You need to sign in or sign up before continuing.

error_signature: The param ‘redirect_uri’ has an invalid value.

error_signature: invalid model ID

error_signature: SSL Issue: consider using the ‘Ignore SSL issues’ option

error_signature: ENOENT: no such file or directory

error_signature: Tags not supported in Zoho CRM node

error_signature: 401 - Token auth is not allowed

error_signature: only first node executes in webhook test

error_signature: Email needs to be verified

error_signature: binary files may be lost between the webhook and the HTTP Request node

error_signature: ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED

error_signature: email body loses formatting when sent

error_signature: json code error

error_signature: The filename, directory name, or volume label syntax is incorrect.

error_signature: /bin/sh: python3: not found

error_signature: argument must be a string (was: object)

error_signature: only returning 1 runs' output

error_signature: Chat Trigger not receiving calls

error_signature: only fetches the oldest file

symptom: When using the Google Drive trigger, it only retrieves the oldest file instead of all new or modified files. This leads to incomplete updates in the vector database.

error_signature: no output from switch node

symptom: The switch node does not produce any output when checking for text, leading to workflow execution issues.

error_signature: NodeOperationError
title: Discord node operation error during execution
symptom: The Discord node fails to execute and throws a 'NodeOperationError' message. This occurs when trying to send a message using the node.

error_signature: ENOTFOUND

symptom: When attempting to connect to Azure Cosmos DB in n8n, the user encounters an 'ENOTFOUND' error.

error_signature: 400 Bad Request

error_signature: infinite execution loop

symptom: The workflow keeps executing indefinitely due to the same set of emails being returned each time.

error_signature: [undefined]

error_signature: ETIMEDOUT

symptom: When executing the Postgres node, it spins indefinitely or returns an 'ETIMEDOUT' error. This indicates a failure to connect to the Supabase database.

error_signature: Can’t determine which item to use
title: Error determining item in Fetch Call Details node
symptom: The Fetch Call Details node throws an error stating 'Can’t determine which item to use' when trying to fetch call details after a Split In Batches node.

error_signature: only returns 20 Value[]

symptom: The workflow only retrieves 20 items from SAP instead of all available items due to pagination not being set up correctly.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')

symptom: When attempting to send a file to LlamaIndex, the process fails with the error 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')'. This indicates that the expected file properties are not being correctly passed to the API.

error_signature: User is missing a scope required to perform this action
title: Missing scope error when deactivating workflows
symptom: When attempting to deactivate a workflow using the Owner account, n8n returns an error stating 'User is missing a scope required to perform this action'. This prevents the workflow from being deactivated.

error_signature: workflow is not active

symptom: Webhook or schedule trigger does not fire. Workflow exists but does not respond to incoming events.

error_signature: Invalid email address (item 0)

symptom: The Gmail node throws 'Invalid email address (item 0)' when using an email address from the AI agent. Manually entered email addresses work fine.

error_signature: Cannot find module 'luxon'

symptom: When executing a code node that requires the Luxon module, n8n throws 'Cannot find module 'luxon''. This prevents the workflow from processing dates correctly.

error_signature: Task request timed out after 60 seconds
title: Task request timeout in external mode
symptom: When using external mode for task runners, the Code nodes timeout after 60 seconds. The UI displays a message indicating that the task was not matched to a runner within the timeout period.

error_signature: 404 resource not found error

symptom: Using an API key in n8n results in a '404 resource not found' error when trying to access resources.

error_signature: Code node hangs or fails to execute scripts

symptom: The Code node in n8n Cloud hangs indefinitely or fails to execute simple scripts. This issue has been reported by multiple users.

error_signature: undefined value in Gmail node

symptom: The Gmail node does not receive the expected data, resulting in an undefined value being sent. This occurs when the data is not properly passed through the workflow.

error_signature: JWT verification fails with exp claim

symptom: The JWT verification fails when using the exp claim set as a duration instead of a timestamp. The verification succeeds when using the Expires In option but fails with the exp JSON setup.

error_signature: QR code does not appear in the execution results
title: QR code not rendering due to outdated Docker image
symptom: When trying to connect the Evolution API to n8n, the QR code fails to appear in the execution results.

error_signature: relative dates default to incorrect year

symptom: When creating Google Calendar events with relative dates, the year defaults to 2024 instead of the current year, leading to incorrect event creation.

error_signature: no such file or directory

symptom: The user receives a 'no such file or directory' error when trying to change into the 'n8n-docker-caddy' directory.

error_signature: Could not replace placeholders in body: Expected ‘,’ or ‘}’

symptom: When using placeholders in the JSON body of an HTTP Request, an error occurs stating 'Could not replace placeholders in body: Expected ‘,’ or ‘}’'.

error_signature: Error code 422 (invalid request)

symptom: The workflow fails at the 'Get Result' node with an error stating 'Your request is invalid or could not be processed by the service'. This occurs when trying to generate images using inputs from local files.

error_signature: metafield not found for update

symptom: When attempting to update a metafield that hasn't been created yet, the update fails because the metafield ID cannot be retrieved.

error_signature: Invalid date format
title: Invalid date format error in DateTime node
symptom: The workflow fails with 'Invalid date format' when trying to extract the year from a date after formatting it.

error_signature: Google Sheets filter returns nothing
title: Google Sheets filter returns empty results
symptom: When filtering data by email in Google Sheets, the filter returns nothing if the email does not exist, causing issues in the IF node.

error_signature: item has no binary field ‘data[0]’

symptom: When attempting to extract the first file from a folder, n8n throws an error stating 'item has no binary field ‘data[0]’'.

error_signature: You have an error in your SQL syntax
title: SQL Syntax Error in MySQL Node
symptom: The second MySQL node throws an error indicating a syntax issue with the SQL query generated by the agent.

error_signature: error 400

symptom: Both Prod and Dev servers receive an error 400 when attempting to sync with Azure Key Vault. This prevents any secrets from being synced.

error_signature: invalid timezone

symptom: When attempting to activate a workflow, n8n throws an 'invalid timezone' error message.

error_signature: Code node shows both JavaScript and Python editors
title: Code node displays incorrect editors for Python
symptom: When using the Code node with Python specified, both JavaScript and Python editors are shown instead of just the Python editor.

error_signature: Airtable rejecting the value for the User field
title: Airtable User field value rejection
symptom: When using the 'Create a record' tool in Airtable, the agent encounters an error indicating that the value for the User field is not accepted.

error_signature: Error 403: access_denied
title: Google OAuth access denied for unapproved app
symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Google Drive, n8n returns 'Error 403: access_denied'. This indicates that the app is still in testing and not fully verified.

error_signature: 400 Bad Request - Your client has issued a malformed or illegal request

symptom: When attempting to upload files using the HTTP Requests node for PineCone Assistance, the user receives a '400 Bad Request' error indicating a malformed request.

error_signature: MongoDB node receives empty value for email

error_signature: Agent stopped due to max iterations

error_signature: Container not updated to the latest version

symptom: After pulling the latest n8n image, the running container still shows the old version. No error messages are displayed during the update process.

error_signature: execution time limit on n8n Cloud

symptom: The workflow does not complete due to exceeding the execution time limit set by n8n Cloud.

error_signature: model dropdown is empty

symptom: When using the OpenRouter node, the model dropdown is empty, preventing selection of a model. Users see 'no models show up' in the dropdown.

error_signature: refreshToken is required

symptom: When attempting to authenticate with Zoho Inventory using generic OAuth2, the error 'refreshToken is required' is displayed.

error_signature: 401, API key is requested

symptom: When executing the HTTP request node for Ghost Genius, a '401, API key is requested' error is displayed, indicating that the API key is not being recognized.

error_signature: output is not an image

symptom: The output from the Gemini HTTP node is not in image format, leading to issues when trying to display or use the image. Instead of an image, the output appears as a string or incorrect format.

error_signature: duplicate key value violates unique constraint

error_signature: Send Email node fails without error message

error_signature: Invalid JSON in response body

error_signature: Node ‘Aggregate2’ hasn’t been executed

error_signature: 500 - "{\"detail\":\"Internal Server Error\"}"

error_signature: Invalid JSON in the response body

error_signature: identity loss during retrieval

error_signature: 400 error regarding API limits

error_signature: SAML Authentication failed. Invalid SAML response

error_signature: Python not available for NodeCode execution

error_signature: error sending message

error_signature: Unable to sign without access token

error_signature: only 1 processed when multiple emails arrive

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'execute')

error_signature: Connection Lost

error_signature: MaxClientsInSessionMode: max clients reached

error_signature: Cannot connect to Supabase PostgreSQL database
title: Connection issue with Supabase PostgreSQL in n8n

error_signature: Unrecognized node type: n8n-nodes-mcp.mcpClientTool

symptom: When attempting to use the MCP community node as an agent tool, n8n throws an error stating 'Unrecognized node type: n8n-nodes-mcp.mcpClientTool'. This prevents the workflow from running successfully.

error_signature: cannot read attachment as binary

error_signature: JSON parameter needs to be valid JSON

error_signature: Provided secret is not valid

error_signature: this.getWorkflowStaticData is not a function

error_signature: Workflow has no node to start the workflow

error_signature: Keep Only Set is enabled

error_signature: No testing function found for this credential.

error_signature: Misconfigured placeholder: 'query'

error_signature: returns a black canvas

error_signature: ghost admin user not showing in user list

error_signature: duplicate schedule trigger executions

error_signature: ValidationError: An invalid ‘request.ip’ detected

error_signature: The file '/data/file.log' is not writable

symptom: When using the 'Read/Write Files from Disk' node, an error states that the file '/data/file.log' is not writable. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.

error_signature: Unknown field name: "message"

error_signature: LLM does not have tool support

error_signature: array type not supported in Custom Code Tool

error_signature: columns.split is not a function

error_signature: Error Trigger only fires for published workflows

error_signature: empty array returned from Get All Orders

error_signature: 404 Not Found

error_signature: only the first item is taken into account

error_signature: replying with JSON in the chatbox

error_signature: Error [TokenInvalid]: An invalid token was provided.

error_signature: authentication failure with Google Business Messages API

error_signature: ERROR: No binary data exists on item!

error_signature: no new rows added due to matching update condition

error_signature: Authorization failed – please check your credentials

error_signature: MCP settings do not persist

error_signature: 404 Not Found

error_signature: 400 - type should not be empty, type must be a string

error_signature: unreadable characters when converting binary to text

error_signature: Cannot create a string longer than 0x1fffffe8 characters

error_signature: EntityMetadataNotFoundError: No metadata for 'InstalledPackages' was found

error_signature: Null output from JSON input into MongoDB

error_signature: Workflow did not finish, possible out-of-memory issue

error_signature: 403 - "Unauthorized. Sign up for a free account."

error_signature: Wait node remains stuck in a loop

error_signature: Request failed with status code 404

error_signature: No binary data found in input. Check previous node output.

error_signature: Cannot create a string longer than 0x1fffffe8 characters

error_signature: ERR_ASSERTION - refreshToken is required
