error_signature: red line in code
title: Error in Code Node Execution
symptom: When executing the Code node, a red line error appears, indicating an issue with the code. However, it does not affect the overall execution.

error_signature: Slack bot does not respond to app mentions
title: Slack bot not responding to app mentions
symptom: The Slack bot does not respond when mentioned in a message, despite working with other triggers. The issue persists even after configuring the necessary settings.

error_signature: Merge node waiting for input 1 to complete
title: Merge node blocking execution due to missing input
symptom: The Merge node is waiting for input 1 to complete, causing the workflow to hang and not return data to the chat.

error_signature: Incorrect String. Hint: A string value must always be enclosed in double quotes
title: Incorrect String error in JSON quiz workflow
symptom: The user receives an 'Incorrect String' error when attempting to validate their JSON input, despite matching the answer key exactly.

error_signature: Extract node produces no output when subworkflow is executed
title: Extract node fails to process binary data in subworkflow
symptom: The Extract node does not produce any output when called from a parent workflow via the Execute Sub-Workflow node, failing silently without an error message.

error_signature: changes to form-trigger.handlebars not persisting
title: Changes to form-trigger.handlebars not persisting in Docker
symptom: After modifying the form-trigger.handlebars file in Docker, changes revert upon restart.

error_signature: must contain a binary file 'data', but none was found [item 0]
title: Missing binary file 'data' in Mistral Upload Node
symptom: When attempting to upload multiple PDFs, the workflow throws an error stating 'must contain a binary file 'data', but none was found [item 0]'. This occurs specifically when reaching the Mistral Upload Node.

error_signature: file is not writable
title: File not writable in n8n v2.0
symptom: When executing a workflow that writes to a file, n8n throws an error stating that the file is not writable after upgrading to version 2.0.

error_signature: The "SUBDOMAIN" variable is not set. Defaulting to a blank string.
title: SUBDOMAIN variable not set in n8n deployment
symptom: When deploying n8n without a subdomain, warnings about the SUBDOMAIN variable not being set appear, and the editor is accessible via an incorrect URL.

error_signature: sub-workflow does not return an output
title: Sub-workflow not returning output to main workflow
symptom: The sub-workflow shows output in its last node but does not return any value to the main workflow, resulting in a blank response.

error_signature: no output
title: No output when uploading images to Google Drive
symptom: When attempting to upload images received via webhook to Google Drive, there is no output generated. The expected file names and types are not being set correctly.

error_signature: Lost connection to the server
title: Lost connection to the server during MCP Client execution
symptom: When executing an MCP Client node, the n8n UI displays 'Lost connection to the server'. Despite this, the backend process continues running.

error_signature: Gateway Timeout: Failed to execute operation after 3 retries
title: HTTP Request Gateway Timeout in Production
symptom: The workflow fails with a 'Gateway Timeout' error after several retries, especially during peak hours.

error_signature: cannot get audio file after adding chat action
title: Unable to retrieve audio file after adding chat action
symptom: After adding a chat action in Telegram, the audio file cannot be retrieved, resulting in errors when trying to access binary data.

error_signature: DOMMatrix is not defined
title: DOMMatrix error in Extract from File (PDF) Node
symptom: The Extract from File (PDF) node fails with the error 'DOMMatrix is not defined' when processing PDFs. This issue started in n8n version 1.98.0 and persists in newer versions.

error_signature: no new row shows up in the sheet
title: Google Sheets append node not adding rows
symptom: The workflow runs without errors, but no new rows appear in the Google Sheet after execution.

error_signature: webhook and callback URLs missing https://
title: Webhook and callback URLs missing HTTPS prefix
symptom: After updating n8n, new webhook and callback URLs are generated without the 'https://' prefix, causing failures in OAuth connections.

error_signature: Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials?
title: HTTP Request returns 403 Forbidden error
symptom: The HTTP Request node returns a 403 Forbidden error indicating potential credential issues. The error message suggests checking the API key or credentials.

error_signature: empty results from SharePoint API
title: Empty results from SharePoint API due to incorrect endpoint
symptom: When querying the SharePoint API for folders/files, the response is empty despite correct permissions. The user sees an empty 'value' array in the response.

error_signature: stuck on version 1.75.2
title: Unable to upgrade n8n beyond version 1.75.2
symptom: The user is unable to upgrade n8n past version 1.75.2 despite running upgrade commands without errors.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split')
title: Undefined property error in Splitter node
symptom: When using the Splitter node, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'split')'. This happens when trying to split fields that are not properly defined.

error_signature: The caller does not have permission
title: Permission denied when saving to Google Sheets
symptom: When attempting to save data to a Google Sheets node, n8n returns a 403 error with the message 'The caller does not have permission'.

error_signature: Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials?
title: AEM API Forbidden Error
symptom: When attempting to create a new AEM page, the workflow returns a 'Forbidden' error, indicating potential credential issues.

error_signature: failed HTTP authentication
title: WebSocket connection fails due to HTTP authentication
symptom: Users experience 'failed HTTP authentication' errors in the browser console when trying to connect via WebSocket. This results in a 'Connection Lost' message.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '# Object')
title: Error accessing binary data from Message Router
symptom: When trying to access the binary data from the Message Router after a merge node, n8n throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '# Object')'.

error_signature: No output data returned
title: Salesforce node returns no output with dynamic expression
symptom: The Salesforce node outputs 'No output data returned' when using a dynamic expression for the SOQL WHERE clause, despite the query working with a hardcoded ID.

error_signature: legacy expression syntax used
title: Error due to legacy expression syntax in AI agent workflow
symptom: The workflow fails when connecting the 'Postgres Chat Memory' to 'set_params', indicating an issue with the expression syntax used for sessionId.

error_signature: agent does not query the vector database
title: AI agent fails to query the vector database
symptom: The AI agent outputs irrelevant responses instead of querying the vector database. It does not utilize the knowledge base as expected.

error_signature: Access Denied Access Denied
title: Access Denied by Web Application Firewall
symptom: When attempting to scrape data using the 'Extract HTML Content' node, the request is blocked with an 'Access Denied' message.

error_signature: returns metadata, no binaries
title: Slack node returns only metadata instead of binary file
symptom: When using the Slack node to get a file, it only returns metadata and not the actual binary file.

error_signature: /bin/sh: curl: not found
title: Curl not found in Execute Command node
symptom: When executing a command in the Execute Command node, n8n returns an error stating '/bin/sh: curl: not found'. This indicates that the curl utility is not available in the Docker container.

error_signature: Error 403: access_denied
title: Gmail API access denied due to verification process
symptom: When attempting to use the Gmail API, an error 403 with 'access_denied' is displayed, indicating that the app is not verified.

error_signature: Cannot find module 'xlsx-populate'
title: Missing xlsx-populate module in Code node
symptom: When executing a Code node that requires the 'xlsx-populate' library, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot find module 'xlsx-populate'.

error_signature: Failed to parse stream
title: Google Gemini Chat Model stream parsing error
symptom: When sending a query through the Google Gemini Chat Model, an error 'Failed to parse stream' appears.

error_signature: OIDC discovery endpoint does not use configured proxy
title: OIDC discovery endpoint ignoring proxy settings
symptom: The OIDC discovery endpoint requests do not route through the configured proxy, while other requests do. This leads to connectivity issues when the proxy is required.

error_signature: The provided authorization grant is invalid, expired, revoked
title: Google OAuth2 credentials expire every 5 days
symptom: The Google OAuth2 API credentials stop working every 5 days, requiring re-authentication. The error message indicates that the authorization grant is invalid or expired.

error_signature: file named 'Untitled' with MIME application/octet-stream
title: File created as 'Untitled' with incorrect MIME type
symptom: When uploading a file using the multipart upload endpoint, the resulting file is created as 'Untitled' with the MIME type 'application/octet-stream'.

error_signature: Referenced node is unexecuted
title: AI Agent node references unexecuted nodes
symptom: When triggering a workflow with multiple schedules, the AI Agent throws an error if it references a node that did not execute during that run.

error_signature: workflow stuck when reading large file from disk
title: Workflow stuck on large file read
symptom: The workflow hangs indefinitely when attempting to read a large file (260mb; .zip) using the Read/Write Files from Disk node.

error_signature: pagination not working in http request node
title: Pagination not functioning due to nested JSON
symptom: The pagination feature in the HTTP Request node does not increment the page number as expected, leading to invalid JSON errors when left empty.

error_signature: Webhook URL mismatch
title: Mismatch in Webhook URL configuration
symptom: The webhook URL is not responding correctly, leading to a 404 error or indefinite waiting. The user is unable to trigger the webhook as expected.

error_signature: Error workflow not auto-triggering
title: Error workflow not triggering on workflow failures
symptom: The error handling workflow does not get triggered when other workflows fail, leading to no error message being displayed.

error_signature: Error:422
title: HTTP Request node returns Error 422 due to incorrect data mapping
symptom: When sending data from the AI node to an HTTP Request node, an Error 422 is returned. This indicates that the data format is incorrect for the expected API input.

error_signature: The service was not able to process your request
context_key: AI Agent node with HTTP Request tool
title: Generic error message from AI Agent on HTTP request failure
symptom: When a tool within the AI Agent fails, it returns a generic error message instead of detailed error information. This makes it difficult to understand the cause of the failure.

error_signature: NJS-518: cannot connect to Oracle Database
title: Oracle Database connection error due to incorrect instance configuration
symptom: When attempting to execute a SQL query in n8n with Oracle node, the error 'NJS-518: cannot connect to Oracle Database' is displayed.

error_signature: 0 production executions
title: Statistics show 0 production executions
symptom: The n8n dashboard displays 0 production executions despite workflows running successfully. This discrepancy occurs after a recent update.

error_signature: Please provide the correct Unique ID.
title: Invalid Unique ID error in HTTP Request node
symptom: When trying to use a Unique ID in the HTTP Request node, n8n returns an error stating 'Please provide the correct Unique ID.'

error_signature: Cannot GET /xxxx_verify.txt
title: 404 error when accessing additional non-UI route
symptom: When trying to access the static file at the specified URL, n8n returns a 404 error: 'Cannot GET /xxxx_verify.txt'. This indicates that the file is not being served correctly.

error_signature: Unknown field name: "id"
title: Airtable update fails due to unknown field name
symptom: When attempting to update a record in Airtable, n8n throws an error stating 'Unknown field name: "id"'. This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.

error_signature: invalid date format for Airtable
title: Handling invalid date formats in Airtable Node
symptom: When sending an empty string, null, or an invalid date format to the Airtable node, an error occurs.

error_signature: No module output when pinned
title: No output displayed for pinned modules in n8n 1.113.0
symptom: After updating to n8n version 1.113.0, no output is shown for individual modules when pinned and run as a test. Users must check the executions tab to see the output.

error_signature: multiple entries in Google Sheets for each chunk
title: Duplicate entries in Google Sheets from chunked processing
symptom: When logging file information in Google Sheets after processing chunks, multiple entries are created for each chunk instead of a single entry per file.

error_signature: Forbidden - perhaps check your credentials?
title: Jira API access forbidden with Atlassian Service Account
symptom: When attempting to retrieve Jira tickets using the Jira node with an Atlassian Service Account, the user receives a 'Forbidden' error message indicating a potential credential issue.

error_signature: Workflow could not be activated. External hook 'workflow.activate' failed.
title: Workflow activation failure due to plan limits
symptom: Users encounter an error stating 'Workflow could not be activated. External hook 'workflow.activate' failed.' when trying to activate workflows beyond the allowed limit.

error_signature: column User.role does not exist
title: User.role column missing in Postgres database
symptom: Users are unable to log into the n8n instance, receiving an error stating 'column User.role does not exist'. This prevents access to workflows.

error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found 404
title: 404 Not Found Error on GET Request
symptom: When using the HTTP Request node to perform a GET request, n8n returns a 404 error indicating that the resource could not be found.

error_signature: server as 'Offline'
title: Workflow editing fails with server reported as 'Offline'
symptom: After upgrading to v2.7.4, the n8n editor shows the server as 'Offline', preventing any workflow editing. The browser debug view indicates constant 404 errors when trying to access the /healthz endpoint.

error_signature: Task request timed out after 300 seconds
title: Code node task request timeout in n8n v2
symptom: When executing a Code node, n8n throws a timeout error after 300 seconds. This indicates that the task runner is not available to process the task.

error_signature: random workflow failures under load
title: Intermittent workflow failures due to resource saturation
symptom: When execution concurrency increases, workflows fail randomly without a clear pattern. This instability is likely linked to resource limitations at the worker level.

error_signature: Parse Error: Header overflow
title: WooCommerce Trigger fails after PHP upgrade
symptom: After upgrading PHP, the WooCommerce Trigger in n8n cannot be activated and shows a 'Header overflow' error.

error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
context_key: HTTP Request node for Vertex AI
title: Invalid JSON structure for Vertex AI image generation
symptom: The HTTP Request node returns a 400 error with 'Bad request - please check your parameters' when trying to generate an image using the Vertex AI API.

error_signature: No model found called ‘gemini-2.5-flash-preview-05-20’
title: Vertex model not found error
symptom: When attempting to use the Vertex chat model with a specific model name, an error indicates that the model is not found.

error_signature: only accessing latest iteration of loop
title: Accessing all items after exiting an If node
symptom: After exiting a loop with an If node, only the latest iteration is accessible, not all items that passed through the loop.

error_signature: unable to access n8n via subdomain after VM restart
title: Access issues with n8n subdomain after VM restart
symptom: After restarting the VM, the user could only access n8n via IP:port, not the subdomain. Initially, everything was working fine before the restart.

error_signature: node has a flaw to ollama
title: Issue with Ollama node in RAG AI agent
symptom: The RAG AI agent does not return useful matches or content when querying the VectorStore using the Ollama node.

error_signature: Access to the file is not allowed. Allowed paths: ...
title: File access not allowed due to restrictions
symptom: When trying to read or write a file on a network share, n8n throws 'Access to the file is not allowed'. This occurs despite having the correct permissions set on the folder.

error_signature: Import of standard library module ‘json’ is disallowed
title: Python task runner disallows standard and external libraries
symptom: The Python task runner throws errors indicating that imports for standard library modules and external packages are disallowed.

error_signature: data is overwritten before reaching the last node
title: Data Overwritten in ClickUp API Workflow
symptom: Data fetched from the ClickUp API is being overwritten with the first item's value before reaching the Upsert node. This results in incorrect data being processed.

error_signature: no webhook POSTs are received for Instagram comments
title: Instagram comments webhook not firing
symptom: Despite correct setup, no POST requests are received for Instagram comments in n8n. Test payloads work, but real events do not trigger any webhook POSTs.

error_signature: error in the memory table
title: Memory table error after enabling runners
symptom: After enabling N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED and OFFLOAD_MANUAL_EXECUTIONS_TO_WORKERS, n8n encounters issues related to the memory table.

error_signature: You have a connection issue or the server is down
title: Connection issue with n8n using Docker and Nginx
symptom: Users encounter a message stating 'You have a connection issue or the server is down' when trying to access n8n. This indicates that n8n is unable to establish a connection.

error_signature: Code node spins continuously without errors
title: Code node hangs after update to 1.84.1
symptom: The Code node spins continuously without providing any error messages. There is also a noticeable slowdown in the interface.

error_signature: window.crypto.randomUUID is not a function
title: Error accessing n8n WebUI after update
symptom: After updating to the latest version of n8n, users encounter 'window.crypto.randomUUID is not a function' error, preventing access to the WebUI.

error_signature: Error in sub-node MCP Client Could not connect to your MCP server
title: MCP Client node connection error
symptom: The workflow fails with an error indicating that the MCP Client could not connect to the MCP server. This occurs during the execution of the node.

error_signature: Check Availability node always returns true
title: Check Availability node returns true for booked slots
symptom: The Check Availability node in n8n returns true even when the time slot is booked, leading to false triggers and multiple bookings.

error_signature: forbidden error
title: AWS S3 node forbidden error due to permissions
symptom: When attempting to use the AWS S3 node for file uploads, a 'forbidden error' is encountered despite correct credentials.

error_signature: 403 Forbidden
title: 403 Forbidden errors due to Cloudflare settings
symptom: Users encounter 403 Forbidden errors when trying to access workflows or invite users in n8n, despite being the owner of the instance.

error_signature: File not found
title: OpenAI node reports 'File not found'
symptom: The OpenAI node fails to process the file and returns 'File not found'. This occurs when the webhook node has no binary data attached.

error_signature: Workspace offline (503)
title: Workspace crashes due to memory exhaustion
symptom: The workspace becomes unavailable with a 'Workspace offline (503)' message during scheduled workflow runs. This occurs consistently when the workflow is triggered.

error_signature: Subscription.ReadWrite.All permission does not exist
title: Microsoft Teams node unable to connect due to missing permission
symptom: Users are unable to connect their Microsoft Teams account in n8n due to a missing permission that is incorrectly documented.

error_signature: credentialTest method not registered
title: Custom node credentialTest method fails to register
symptom: The credential test for the custom oraclesql node does not provide any connection message, indicating it has failed to register the test method.

error_signature: Callback verification failed with the following errors: HTTP Status Code = 408
title: WhatsApp Trigger callback verification failed
symptom: When verifying the webhook for the WhatsApp Trigger node, n8n returns a 'Callback verification failed' error with a 408 status code, indicating a request timeout.

error_signature: empty pageContent value returned from Qdrant
title: Empty pageContent in Qdrant query results
symptom: When querying the Qdrant vector store, the results return an empty 'pageContent' value, while metadata is populated correctly.

error_signature: Gmail node sending 2 emails per interaction
title: Gmail node sends duplicate emails
symptom: The Gmail node is sending two emails for each interaction triggered by the webhook. This issue started recently and persists despite attempts to adjust settings.

error_signature: $helpers is not defined
title: $helpers object is undefined in Code node
symptom: The Code node script fails when trying to access `$helpers`, resulting in an error indicating that it is not defined.

error_signature: No fields - item(s) exist, but they're empty
title: Subworkflow returns empty fields despite data being present
symptom: The parent workflow calls a subworkflow, but it receives 'No fields - item(s) exist, but they're empty' even though the subworkflow has data to return.

error_signature: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading ‘error’)
title: Error reading properties in Discord embed JSON
symptom: When trying to configure the Raw JSON for Discord embeds, an error occurs stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading ‘error’)'.

error_signature: Service unavailable - try again later
title: Ollama service unavailable due to npm proxy settings
symptom: When trying to connect n8n to a local Ollama instance, the error 'Service unavailable - try again later' appears. The logs indicate a 404 status code for a missing model.

error_signature: Conversion error: the string ‘Invalid DateTime’ can’t be converted to a dateTime
title: Invalid DateTime conversion during date comparison
symptom: When running the full workflow, an error occurs stating 'Invalid DateTime' during date comparisons, while single node tests succeed.

error_signature: event created at the wrong time
title: Outlook event created with incorrect time zone
symptom: Events created in Outlook appear one hour later than intended. The agent confirms the correct time, but Outlook shows a discrepancy.

error_signature: Problem submitting response
title: Form submission fails with 'Problem submitting response'
symptom: When attempting to submit a form using the n8n form trigger node, the user receives a message stating 'Problem submitting response'. This occurs consistently during submissions.

error_signature: The request is missing a required parameter
title: UpWork OAuth2 token expiration issue
symptom: After 24 hours, the UpWork node fails with an error indicating a missing or invalid parameter, preventing the workflow from executing.

error_signature: unable to extract text from binary file
title: Unable to extract text from binary file
symptom: The output from the file node shows file metadata but not the actual content. The user sees a message indicating the file is in binary format.

error_signature: Authorization failed - please check your credentials
title: OneDrive Excel access denied due to credentials issue
symptom: When running a scheduled workflow, n8n throws an authorization error stating 'You do not have permissions to open this file in the browser'. This occurs consistently when the device is closed.

error_signature: Connection Lost
title: Connection Lost on fresh install in Hostinger
symptom: After setting up n8n on Hostinger, the interface shows 'Connection Lost' when trying to upload a template.

error_signature: sh: apk: not found
title: APK package manager not found in Docker container
symptom: When trying to install packages in a Docker container, the command 'apk' returns 'sh: apk: not found'. This indicates that the Alpine package manager is not available in the hardened image.

error_signature: JavaScript heap out of memory
title: JavaScript heap out of memory during n8n audit
symptom: When running the n8n audit command, the process fails with a 'JavaScript heap out of memory' error. This occurs even after increasing the memory limit to 3GB.

error_signature: webhook not triggering in production
title: Webhook not triggering in production mode
symptom: The webhook URL works in test mode but does not trigger the workflow in production, despite the external service indicating a successful request.

error_signature: Invalid Custom Auth JSON
title: Invalid Custom Auth JSON error when using API to update credentials
symptom: After updating credentials via the n8n API, using them results in an 'Invalid Custom Auth JSON' error. The credentials only work after re-saving them in the UI.

error_signature: file not found for script execution
title: File not found for executing script
symptom: The script fails to execute because it cannot locate the downloaded PDF file from Google Drive.

error_signature: main workflow calling an older version of subworkflow
title: Main workflow using outdated subworkflow version
symptom: The main workflow is executing an older version of the subworkflow, despite updates being made in the development environment. This leads to unexpected behavior without any error messages.

error_signature: Connection lost: You have a connection issue or the server is down.
title: Connection lost error in n8n Docker setup
symptom: Users encounter a 'Connection lost' error when trying to import workflows in n8n. This prevents further actions from being taken within the application.

error_signature: $PATH is too broad
title: Error executing n8n command in Docker: $PATH is too broad
symptom: When trying to execute a command in the n8n Docker container, the user receives an exit 2 error indicating that the $PATH is too broad. This prevents the command from running successfully.

error_signature: Bad Request: can’t parse entities
title: Telegram node fails when attribution is disabled
symptom: Disabling the 'Include n8n attribution in responses' setting causes the Telegram node to fail with a 'Bad Request' error. The node works correctly when attribution is enabled.

error_signature: no output from the update row in Google Sheet node
title: Google Sheet node not outputting data
symptom: The Google Sheet node runs without errors but does not output any data to the sheet. The workflow completes normally, but the expected updates are missing.

error_signature: sub-workflow finishes immediately without running
title: Sub-workflow finishes immediately when not waiting for completion
symptom: When disabling 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion', the sub-workflow is triggered but finishes immediately without executing its tasks.
